canonical_definition: The latent ability of a model to correctly identify and interpret event types and their structures from multimodal inputs, integrating relevant textual and visual cues while ignoring irrelevant or misleading features.
papers: ModRWKV: Transformer Multimodality in Linear Time
Unsupervised Concept Vector Extraction for Bias Control inLLMs
